name: toolkit
description: Codex-ready handoff, claim-check, qa-sweep, and doc-to-html skills and bundled reviewer files from Agent Workshop.

interface.shortDescription: Review handoff and doc-to-html skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex manifest for the Agent Workshop toolkit plugin. Codex exposes the handoff-review, handoff-pr, handoff-goal, doc-to-html, claim-check, and qa-sweep skills from this package; the reviewer agent files are bundled in the payload for Claude Code and reference, but Codex standalone custom agents still need repo-local .codex/agents wrappers.
defaultPrompt: Turn a markdown report into a standalone HTML page.
Investigate whether a ticket or claim still holds.
Run a team-scale QA sweep over a release and corroborate the findings.
Explain how to install reviewer agents for Codex.
